text:
Once upon a time in a whimsical village tucked under whispering trees, there lived a girl named Clara. Clara loved to wear the yellow flowers her grandmother planted by the pond every morning, and she had a soft red ribbon tied around her middle.

Every day afterward, she would spin stories about her magical flower garden. The little flowers had secrets. They whispered about hidden springs, ancient trees, and the time long ago when the village was ruled by butterflies.

One peculiar evening, Clara wandered deeper into the woods than usual. The path led her past towering oaks that groaned under their own weight. Near the pond, she found an ancient willow tree that seemed to look right through her.

She sat down by the water's edge, and suddenly, the air shimmered. From the root of the willow grew a single, pulsating flower. It was a lantern flower. But not just any lantern flower—you could peer into it and see the entire story of the village.
